svg.title: Final system architecture
svg.desc: Complete architecture of the AI server monitoring system with all components, data flows, and the confirmed action boundary

g.text: Unix socket in single mode · TCP + HMAC auth in multi mode · same agent code both ways
Ollama · llama.cpp · auto-detects CUDA / ROCm / CPU
Confirmation gate — no action executes without explicit user approval
restart service · kill process · clear temp/logs · adjust ulimits · run approved script
